ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "project_leader" TEXT /* The lead data scientist or project manager for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the project */,
  "team_size" INTEGER /* The number of team members working on the project */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the project details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project the model belongs to */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., logistic regression, random forest) */,
  "training_dataset" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for training */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the model */,
  "training_duration" TEXT /* The duration it took to train the model */,
  "hyperparameters" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store the hyperparameters used for training */,
  "training_environment" TEXT /* The environment where the model was trained (e.g., AWS, GCP) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the model details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of performance metrics */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the metrics belong to */,
  "train_accuracy" REAL /* Training accuracy of the model */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Test accuracy of the model */,
  "precision_class1" REAL /* Precision for class 1 on test data */,
  "precision_class2" REAL /* Precision for class 2 on test data */,
  "recall_class1" REAL /* Recall for class 1 on test data */,
  "recall_class2" REAL /* Recall for class 2 on test data */,
  "f1_class1" REAL /* F1 score for class 1 on test data */,
  "f1_class2" REAL /* F1 score for class 2 on test data */,
  "precision_class1_train" REAL /* Precision for class 1 on training data */,
  "precision_class2_train" REAL /* Precision for class 2 on training data */,
  "recall_class1_train" REAL /* Recall for class 1 on training data */,
  "recall_class2_train" REAL /* Recall for class 2 on training data */,
  "f1_class1_train" REAL /* F1 score for class 1 on training data */,
  "f1_class2_train" REAL /* F1 score for class 2 on training data */,
  "train_loss" REAL /* The loss value for the training data */,
  "test_loss" REAL /* The loss value for the test data */,
  "auc_roc" REAL /* The Area Under the ROC Curve for the model */,
  "confusion_matrix" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store the confusion matrix */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* The version of the model for which the metrics are recorded */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* The date when the performance metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer, project manager) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* The phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "department" TEXT /* The department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The last date the user logged into the system */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON or text field to store the user's permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used to access the model */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* The duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_logs_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model version */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the model version was released */,
  "changelog" TEXT /* A detailed log of changes made in this version */,
  "binary_path" TEXT /* The path to the binary file of the model */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The last date the version details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
